calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2021 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs? Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing; Declaration Of Philip A. Segal
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Nicholas Pessah.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:26 a.m.

Riane Briones, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Roger Cardenas and Ko Ko Oo, who were placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Briones, along with Messrs. Cardenas and Oo, appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Nicholas Pessah.

Plaintiff's Personal Injury Complaint (Motor Vehicle) was filed on October 16, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint, Statement of Damages and accompanying documents on defendant Nicholas Pessah occurred on November 3, 2019, and was effectuated on December 5, 2019.
Default as to defendant Nicholas Pessah was entered on February 7, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 30, 2020.

Plaintiffs Roger Cardenas and Ko Ko Oo submit the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Photographs of damaged cab number 945......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Medical Liens as to plaintiff Ko Ko Oo.....................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Medical records of plaintiff Ko Ko Oo......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Plaintiff Ko Ko Oo's income statement as of June, 2019.....................ID/EVID
Exhibit 5: Receipt for cost of replacement cab........................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Roger Cardenas and Ko Ko Oo, and against the defaulted defendant Nicholas Pessah, as follows:

Damages - $12,039.40.
Costs - $530.00.

Total - $12,569.40.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:43 a.m.
